2605.22654.title: Seeing the Poem: Image-Semantic Detection of AI-Generated Modern Chinese Poetry with MLLMs
2605.22654.paper_summary: Previous detection studies have shown that LLMs cannot be effectively used as detectors, but these studies have not addressed modern Chinese poetry. Moreover, no relevant research has explored the performance of LLMs in detecting modern Chinese poetry. This paper evaluates and enhances the performance of LLMs as detectors for modern Chinese poetry, and proposes an image-semantic guided poetry detection method. Compared with traditional detection approaches, our method innovatively incorporates images that reflect the content of the poetry. Through example-driven approaches, our method effectively integrates information such as meaning, imagery, and feeling from the image, then forms a complementary judgment with the poem text. Experimental results demonstrate that the LLM detectors based on our method outperform baseline detectors based on plain text, and even surpass the best-performing traditional detector, RoBERTa. The Gemini detector using our method achieves a Macro-F1 score of 85.65%, reaching the state-of-the-art level. The performance improvements of different LLM detectors on multiple LLMs-generated data prove the effectiveness of our method.
2605.22654.paper_summary_zh: 先前的檢測研究顯示，LLMs無法有效地用作檢測器，但這些研究並未涉及現代中文詩。此外，尚未有相關研究探討LLMs在檢測現代中文詩方面的表現。本文評估並提升LLMs作為現代中文詩檢測器的性能，並提出一種影像語義引導的詩歌檢測方法。與傳統檢測方法相比，我們的方法創新性地融入了反映詩歌內容的圖像。通過示例驅動的方法，我們的方法有效整合了來自圖像的意義、意象和情感等信息，然後與詩歌文本形成互補的判斷。實驗結果表明，基於我們方法的LLM檢測器在性能上超越了基於純文本的基準檢測器，甚至超越了表現最佳的傳統檢測器RoBERTa。使用我們方法的Gemini檢測器達到了85.65%的Macro-F1分數，達到最先進的水平。不同LLM檢測器在多個LLMs生成數據上的性能提升證明了我們方法的有效性。
2605.22654.author: Shanshan Wang et.al.
2605.22654.authors: Shanshan Wang, Fengying Ye, Hanjia Lyu, Caiwen Gou, Junchao Wu, Jingming Yao, Chengzhong Xu, Jiebo Luo, Derek F. Wong
